newsitems.title: Ubisoft "поздравила" разработчиков Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced с премьерой увольнениями
newsitems.author: Deacon
newsitems.contents: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced получила хорошие оценки и ещё даже не успела добраться до всех платформ, а Ubisoft уже начала сокращать создавших её разработчиков.

newsitems.title: Known issue updare: cutscenes on PC locked to 30 FPS (workaround)
newsitems.author: Ubi_Grogu
newsitems.contents: [p]Hello Assassins,    [/p][p][/p][p]We are aware that there is an issue where cutscenes on PC are locked to 30 FPS when using Raytracing, BVH or Terrain Quality at Ultra High setting.   [/p][p][/p][p]We have a fix coming soon, but in the meantime, we've provided a temporary workaround:  Reset the graphics Overall Preset to any pre-configured setting and avoid manually setting Raytracing, BVH or Terrain Quality to the Ultra High setting.   [/p][p][/p][p]Thanks for your patience! [/p][hr][/hr][p align="start"]Link to Known Issues: Day 1 Known Issues -[url="https://steamcommunity.com/app/3751950/discussions/0/570417328562421186/"] AC Black Flag resynced :: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced General Discussion[/url][/p][p align="start"]Link to Bug Reporter: [url="https://www.ubisoft.com/en-us/game/assassins-creed/black-flag-resynced/bug-reporter/"]Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Bug Report[/url][/p]

newsitems.title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced вышла на консолях — релиз для ПК состоится вечером
newsitems.author: Rakot
newsitems.contents: В минувшую полночь Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced стала доступна для игры на PlayStation 5 и Xbox Series X|S. Пользователям ПК придётся подождать вечера из-за особенностей релиза в Steam.

newsitems.title: How to access the local language packs
newsitems.author: Ubi_Grogu
newsitems.contents:
[p]Hello everyone, [/p][p] [/p][p]We have addressed an issue where some players could not find find their local language pack. 
In case you are still encountering the issue, here are some instructions to access the language packs:[/p][olist][*][p]Close the game[/p][/*][*][p]Close Steam + Reopen Steam[/p][/*][*][p]Set the language as seen on the following screenshot[/p][p][/p][/*][/olist][p][img src="{STEAM_CLAN_IMAGE}/46094181/7cbc758faecb2d770a55684a3626600c70874879.jpg"][/img][/p][p][/p][p][/p]

newsitems.title: Ubisoft has added a cash shop and weekly challenges to its 'faithful' remake of the 13-year-old Black Flag, because of course it has
newsitems.author: Rory Norris
newsitems.contents: For the most part, the long-awaited and worst-kept secret, Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced, is very faithful to one of my favourite games from 13 years ago. And anything that's brand-new, like some islands, the ship officers, and an extended story, fits in pretty seamlessly, almost like they were there in the original... Read more.
